    {
        if (src is null) return global::System.Array.Empty<global::Demo.DstV>();
        if (global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe.SizeOf<global::Demo.SrcV>() != global::System.Runtime.CompilerServices.Unsafe.SizeOf<global::Demo.DstV>())
